components.description: When a user describes a meal. Estimate the calories, and sodium content, display to user, and offer to log.
components.dialog:
kind: InlineAgentSkill
content: |+
  ---
  name: log-meal
  description: When a user describes a meal. Estimate the calories, and sodium content, display to user, and offer to log.
  ---
  <!-- bic:source=blank -->
  When this skill is activated:

  1. Determine the likely ingredients
  2. Look up the calorie and sodium content of each ingredient.
  3. Display the meal name, calorie, and sodium content estimate to the user.
  4. If the user says yes then call log-meal workflow.
